query:
SELECT
                 o.slug AS "slug!",
                 o.label AS "label!",
                 o.description,
                 COALESCE(
                     ARRAY(
                         SELECT p.slug FROM oracle_tags p
                         WHERE p.id = ANY(o.parent_ids)
                         ORDER BY p.slug
                     ),
                     ARRAY[]::text[]
                 ) AS "parent_slugs!"
               FROM oracle_tags o
               ORDER BY o.slug ASC
